home.heroSubtitle: One vessel. One standard. A skippered day on the water — from Marina Ibiza to Formentera's turquoise shallows.
home.extrasSubtitle: Every charter is a blank canvas. Add what makes the day yours.
home.ctaTitle: Ready for your day on the water?
home.ctaSubtitle: Check availability and reserve online in minutes.

fleet.title: One vessel, one standard
fleet.subtitle: We run a small fleet on purpose — every charter gets the same attention, on the water and off.

reserva.title: Your day on the water
reserva.name: Full name
reserva.notesPlaceholder: Anything we should know — celebrations, dietary notes, pickup point…
reserva.selectDatePrompt: Select a date to see pricing
reserva.errorGeneric: Something went wrong — please try again or WhatsApp us.
reserva.guestsOverCapacity: This boat holds up to {capacity} guests.
reserva.priceUnavailable: Pricing for this boat isn't set yet — please WhatsApp us to book.
reserva.confirmationBody: Thank you — your reservation {reference} is confirmed. A confirmation email is on its way, and the balance is due before boarding.
reserva.confirmationPending: We're confirming your payment — this can take a moment. If this doesn't update shortly, WhatsApp us with your reference.
reserva.confirmationNotFound: We couldn't find that reservation. If you completed a payment, WhatsApp us and we'll sort it out.
